name: Release Notes Generator
description: After a merge to main, draft a CHANGELOG-style, conventional-commit-grouped release section from the merged PR(s) + commits. Read-first: it PRINTS the notes by default; the only mutation (prepending to CHANGELOG.md) is gated behind --write, and --gh-release only PRINTS the `gh release create` command — it never cuts a release.
note: Mechanical after-merge documentation step of the release lifecycle; no skill file of its own — it composes under the ci-release-orchestrator skill (the merge/deploy gate runs first, then this drafts the notes).

invoke.output: a CHANGELOG-style markdown section to stdout; structured report under --json

observability.outcome: the rendered release section + report { range, commitCount, prCount, wrote, ghReleaseCmd }; --write prepends to CHANGELOG.md (gated, fail-closed)
